Because what's the point of buying a six-month supply if I've only got two months to try this out? So by simply switching it to the 180-day money-back guarantee, that actually reduces the refund rate dramatically, because then, not only increases the six-bottle take rate, but also reduces the refund rate because people have longer to try the product out. So instead of feeling this pressure of like, if I don't start feeling these miraculous results in the first 15 days, and I gotta get a refund because I've only got 30 days, or I've only got 60 days, now they have enough time to really try the product to get used to it.
